mapper.select: -- as需要对应result的column SELECT m.from_name AS userName, COUNT(m.id) AS messageCount, u.path AS path FROM user u -- inner join 相当于取交集 Inner JOIN message m ON m.from_name = u.user_name AND m.send_at BETWEEN #{sendAtStart} AND #{sendAtEnd} GROUP BY m.from_name, u.path ORDER BY messageCount DESC;
